message:
feat(tools,storage): migrate archive writes to write-behind queue with sync fallback

Replace synchronous archive writes in messaging, identity, and
reservations tools with a write-behind queue (wbq_enqueue) pattern.
Each tool now constructs a WriteOp enum variant and attempts async
enqueue; if the queue is full, falls back to synchronous writes to
ensure no data loss. This decouples MCP tool response latency from
disk I/O and git operations.

messaging.rs:
  - try_write_message_archive now builds WriteOp::MessageBundle and
    enqueues, with sync fallback. Notification signals also use
    WriteOp::NotificationSignal with the same pattern.

identity.rs:
  - Agent profile archive writes use WriteOp::AgentProfile with
    wbq_enqueue, falling back to synchronous ensure_archive +
    write_agent_profile.

reservations.rs:
  - Reservation artifact writes use WriteOp::ReservationArtifact
    and release cleanup uses WriteOp::ReservationRelease, both
    with sync fallback paths.

Cargo.toml changes:
  - Add glob 0.3.3 to workspace deps (for pattern matching in storage).
  - Add tracing to mcp-agent-mail-storage (for wbq logging).
  - Add mcp-agent-mail-storage dep to server crate (for wbq init).
  - Add glob to tools crate deps.

conformance.rs:
  - Update test assertions for new write-behind timing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1836,6 +1836,7 @@ name = "ftui-layout"
 version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
+ "rustc-hash",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -3850,6 +3851,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fastmcp-transport",
  "mcp-agent-mail-core",
  "mcp-agent-mail-db",
+ "mcp-agent-mail-storage",
  "mcp-agent-mail-tools",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
@@ -3895,6 +3897,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "sha2",
  "tempfile",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
+ "tracing",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -3908,6 +3911,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fastmcp-rust",
  "fastmcp-server",
  "git2",
+ "glob",
  "globset",
  "mcp-agent-mail-core",
  "mcp-agent-mail-db",

@@ -62,6 +62,7 @@ thiserror = "2"
 chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
 regex = "1"
 git2 = "0.19"
+glob = "0.3.3"
 globset = "0.4"
 tracing = "0.1"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }

@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ fs2 = "0.4"
 image = { version = "0.25", default-features = false, features = ["png", "jpeg", "gif", "webp", "bmp", "tiff"] }
 base64 = "0.22"
 thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
 mcp-agent-mail-core = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-core" }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
